audit: BBF Tier × Feature Mapping — System Reality Audit
method: Read-only. Live Supabase project ihclbceghxpuawymlvgi (execute_sql/list_tables/list_edge_functions), frontend entitlement source, and a live Stripe spot-check (acct_1TLzQCQ4j3uHTi7P). No mutations.
headline_findings: Pricing reality = 13 CANONICAL tiers in bbf_tiers (catalyst/momentum/autonomous, fuel_*, rising_athlete, 6 hybrids). The brief's 'gateway/architect/sovereign' are LEGACY slugs — still honored for grandfathering, NOT in the canonical matrix.
33 edge functions are deployed & ACTIVE (brief assumed 22). 25 live in the repo; 8 are deployed-only.

There is NO bbf_feature_gates table. Feature gating lives entirely in the frontend (entitlements.js) and is — by its own header — a COSMETIC, FAIL-OPEN upsell funnel, not a server-side access boundary.
bbf_tiers rows carry NULL stripe_price_id / stripe_payment_link; the LIVE checkout links exist only in frontend/pricingMatrix.js + stripe-webhook PRICE_TO_TIER. Source-of-truth drift.
Wearable DEVICE sync (bbf_wearable_readings) is DORMANT (0 rows). In-app readiness self-report (bbf_readiness) is LIVE (721 rows). The brief conflates the two.
Access-Control kill-switch is in-repo but NOT applied to prod: bbf_validate_vault_session + bbf_admin_set_access_status absent, and verify_user_pin/sync_* bodies lack the lock guard.

features_unlocked: Workout + nutrition tracking fully unlocked (marketing copy)
tiers.note: Same entitlement group as Momentum — identical UI tab access despite 2.5x price. Differentiation is marketing copy/AI-depth, NOT gated surfaces. Marketing copy says 'nutrition fully unlocked' but the nutrition tab maps to GROUP.NUTRITION, not FITNESS_PRO.
Identical entitlement group/UI access to Fuel: Foundation and Fuel: Sovereign — the 3 Fuel tiers are NOT differentiated by gated surfaces.

legacy_tiers_still_honored.note: NOT in bbf_tiers. Accepted by stripe-webhook ALLOWED_TIERS + entitlements TIER_TO_GROUP for grandfathering until the monolith storefront retires.

live_user_tier_distribution.observation: No live user is on any of the 3 fitness or 3 nutrition canonical slugs yet; real users sit on legacy slugs + 1 rising_athlete.

edge_functions.tier_gating_note: Edge functions are NOT tier-gated server-side. entitlements.js gates only the UI tab; the underlying (paid) function remains callable. 'Accessible per tier' below means 'feeds a tab that tier's UI unlocks'.

feature_gate_audit.actual_mechanism: frontend/src/lib/entitlements.js (TIER_TO_GROUP + TAB_ACCESS), read via RPC bbf_get_trial_state (LIVE).
feature_gate_audit.self_described_as: COSMETIC upsell funnel, FAIL-OPEN, explicitly 'not an access-control security boundary'.

access_groups.FITNESS_BASE: program, generator, cardio, mindset (prehab + nutrition padlocked)
access_groups.YOUTH: /sports route + Kinematic Form HUD (advanced Vault tabs padlocked)
access_groups.ALL: God Mode — every surface (hybrids, legacy sovereign, admins, active trial)
access_groups.NONE: no active subscription — everything sellable padlocked

wearable_device_sync.acwr_layer: bbf_wearable_acwr RPC NOT deployed to prod
wearable_device_sync.flag: No live device/wearable data flowing — dormant pending real feed/app review.

in_app_readiness.note: Manual self-report (score/sleep_quality/soreness) via bbf_sync_readiness. NOT the same as wearable sync.

sports_hub.evidence: bbf_athlete_progression 11 rows (basketball x5, football x5, soccer x1) through 2026-05-30; bbf_admin_roster deployed v13; coach_analytics RPCs present.
sports_hub.caveat: bbf_active_clients (5 rows) = 4 real 'Pending' + 1 'BBF Webhook Test' artifact.

nutrition_locker.evidence: bbf-meal-macros (v9) + bbf-meal-image (v10) deployed; bbf_meal_macros 53 rows (to 5/31), bbf_meal_logs 10 rows (to 5/29).

vault_core.evidence: bbf_logs 62 rows to 2026-06-03; bbf_vault_sessions latest 2026-06-04; bbf_agent_runs 45.

cardio_engine.evidence: bbf-agentic-cardio v19 + 2 shadows deployed; bbf_cardio_protocols 0, bbf_cardio_logs 0.

conversions_capture.evidence: bbf_conversions 0 rows despite live payment links; bbf_completion_events 1; bbf_monetization_metrics deployed but unwired.

flagged_discrepancies: BRIEF vs REALITY — tier names: brief lists gateway/architect/sovereign (legacy); canonical live set is 13 different slugs.
BRIEF vs REALITY — edge count: brief says 22; 33 are deployed & ACTIVE.
NO bbf_feature_gates table — gating is frontend-only, cosmetic, fail-open.
bbf_tiers stripe linkage NULL — live price IDs/links live only in frontend + webhook (source-of-truth drift).
Within-category access collapse — 3 Fuel tiers share one entitlement group; Momentum & Autonomous share one — price tiers not backed by distinct gated surfaces.
Autonomous marketing copy claims nutrition 'fully unlocked' but nutrition tab is gated to GROUP.NUTRITION, not FITNESS_PRO.
Access-Control kill-switch (migration 20260602120000) committed but NOT applied to prod — kill switch non-functional; sessionGuard heartbeat fails open.
Wearable device sync dormant (0 rows); ACWR RPC undeployed.
Cardio engine deployed with zero protocols/logs.
Zero conversions captured via the new pipeline despite live Stripe links.
